# Golden master fixtures

`.aasx` sample files, copied from `src/BlazorUI/*.aasx` in the
[eclipse-aasx-package-explorer](https://github.com/kunalsuri/eclipse-aasx-package-explorer)
fork.

`expected/*.json` are the golden output snapshots for those samples,
generated by that repo's `AasxGoldenMasterHarness` console tool (a
headless .NET tool that parses, validates, and serializes each `.aasx`
file with `AasxCsharpLibrary`/`AasCore.Aas3_1`). Each snapshot has the
same base name as its source `.aasx` file.

Integration tests under `tests/integration/golden-master/` run these
same files through this app's own parser/validator and diff the result
against the committed JSON here.

## Regenerating

These are generated occasionally, not on every `npm test` — regenerating
requires the .NET SDK, which this repo doesn't otherwise depend on. To
refresh them after a real change to the C# reference behavior:

```powershell
cd eclipse-aasx-package-explorer/src
dotnet run --project AasxGoldenMasterHarness -- --input BlazorUI --output AasxGoldenMasterHarness/GoldenMasters/BlazorUI
```

then copy the updated `.aasx` files and `GoldenMasters/BlazorUI/*.json`
here, overwriting this directory and `expected/`.

## Known finding

Six of the eight fixtures contain a `ConceptDescription
.EmbeddedDataSpecification` with a `null` `DataSpecification` reference.
The C# harness's own generated verifier throws a `NullReferenceException`
on that shape instead of returning a validation error — see
`validation.error` in the corresponding `expected/*.json` snapshot.
This app's parser/validator does not need to reproduce that exception;
it only needs to reproduce `parse` and `serialization` results, and,
where `validation.success` is `true` upstream, the reported errors.
